unreleased: Fixed Claude sign-in getting stuck when authorization step is missed — now shows a retry button
Added built-in Claude account option (Vertex AI) - no personal Claude sign-in needed
Added pin toggle (⌘P) to keep the floating dialog open when clicking away
Added Response Style setting for floating bar (Off/Soft/Strict) to control answer compactness
Added stop button and follow-up-while-streaming to floating bar
Chat persists when clicking away from floating bar; collapses to half-height semi-transparent preview and restores on focus
Replaced pin button with New Chat button in floating bar
Removed background style (solid/transparent) toggle from settings
Code snippets in floating bar are now collapsed to 5 lines with a quick copy button
Moved floating bar to bottom of screen — chat now expands upward
Post-onboarding tutorial now continues as a guided chat in the floating bar with 3 test prompts
Added Google Workspace integration — ask about your email, calendar, and files directly from the floating bar
Fixed exploration text blocks running together without line breaks
Improved exploration card with larger pulsating toggle button and inline loading animation
Added visible loading animation when transcribing voice input after push-to-talk
Fixed follow-up messages failing while AI is still generating a response
Stop button now stays visible during AI streaming and is colored red
Bundled mcp-server-macos-use binary inside the app for built-in macOS automation support
Screen capture and macOS automation now uses native accessibility APIs instead of browser screenshot
Fixed AI responses appearing concatenated without spaces when using tool calls or chain of thought
Added staging update channel for pre-release testing
Fixed memory crash during initial file indexing on large filesystems
Fixed Right Command push-to-talk triggering on Left Cmd and modifier combos
Optimized memory usage in file indexing service
Fixed floating bar horizontal jumps and screen switching on multi-monitor setups
Added copy buttons to messages and conversations in floating bar
Fixed plain text copying in markdown responses
Fixed orphaned ACP bridge processes on quit
Added escape key hint to floating bar close button
Added suggested reply buttons after AI responses in the floating bar
Improved update experience: shows helpful guidance when macOS blocks auto-updates due to App Management permission
Fixed chat getting permanently stuck after a temporary API error
Reduced default chat height by half and persist user resize preference across sessions
Fixed infinite retry loop when built-in credits run out — now auto-switches to personal Claude account
Fixed push-to-talk input being lost when clicking away without sending
Added Sentry error reporting to critical error paths (database, chat, audio, auth) for better production issue visibility
Added comprehensive analytics tracking: session duration, conversation depth, tool success/failure, floating bar response metrics, credit exhaustion, and onboarding start events
